zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Coke於1480年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 多丁頓時，他的父親Thomas Coke35歲，母親Alice Folcard36歲。他於1512年4月與Ann Woodhouse在英國英格蘭諾福爾可米列哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年4月22日在英國素瑞貝爾蒙享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Coke于1480年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 多丁頓时，他的父亲Thomas Coke35岁，母亲Alice Folcard36岁。他于1512年4月与Ann Woodhouse在英国英格兰諾福爾可米列哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年4月22日在英国素瑞貝爾蒙享年76岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Coke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Cook   or   Cocke  .
Americanized form of German   Koke   or   Koch  .

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Coke was born in 1480, in Great Doddington, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Coke, was 35 and his mother, Alice Folcard, was 36. He married Ann Woodhouse in April 1512, in Mileham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 April 1556, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Coke est né en 1480, à Great Doddington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Coke, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Folcard, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ann Woodhouse en avril 1512, à Mileham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1556, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Cokeが1480年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ドッドイントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Cokeは35歳，母Alice Folcardは36歳であった。1512年4月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクミレハムでAnn Woodhouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年4月22日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで76歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Coke(이)가 1480년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Coke(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Folcard(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1512년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 마일레함에서 Ann Woodhouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 4월 22일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Ann Woodhouse em abril de 1512, em Mileham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1556, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Coke родился в 1480 г. в местности грит доддингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Coke было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Folcard, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Woodhouse апрель 1512 г. в местности милэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 апреля 1556 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.
